nodes.title: Display Dashboard Layout
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId page loads, display dashboard with sidebar navigation, header with business name, and main content area with widget grid. Sidebar shows sections and items from GET /api/businesses/:bizId/sidebar-sections.

nodes.title: Display Stats Widget
nodes.description: When dashboard loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/widget-stats-enhanced and display summary cards showing totalReceipts, totalPayments, netCashFlow, and comparison with previous period. Shows percentage change with up/down arrows.

nodes.title: Display Chart Widget
nodes.description: When dashboard loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/widget-chart-enhanced and render bar/line chart showing receipts vs payments over time. Chart supports period selection (6 months, 12 months, year).

nodes.title: Display Activity Log
nodes.description: When dashboard loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/widget-log-enhanced and display scrollable list of recent activities. Each entry shows type icon, description, amount, and timestamp. Supports lazy loading on scroll.
